about_text:
I am Virgile Popote, a freelance web developer in Guadeloupe, specialized in creating modern and high-performing websites.

My role: designing custom showcase websites and web applications, designed to be aesthetic, fast and SEO optimized.

Thanks to my skills in UI/UX design and development (Ruby on Rails, React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS), I create intuitive platforms that showcase your brand and convert your visitors into customers.

Passionate about digital, I support entrepreneurs, associations and startups in developing their online presence and standing out from the competition.

👉 Looking for a reliable partner for your web project? Contact me and let's bring your idea to life.

ruby.title: Ruby on Rails
ruby.description: For back-end development, I use Ruby on Rails, a robust framework that allows creating complex web applications and high-performance APIs. Ideal for projects that require a solid and scalable foundation.

react.title: React / Next.js
react.description: I develop dynamic and fast user interfaces with React and Next.js. These technologies are perfect for creating modern websites, optimized for SEO and offering an excellent user experience.

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: I use Tailwind CSS to quickly create custom and responsive designs. This tool allows me to build aesthetic and consistent interfaces while keeping the code clean and maintainable.

wordpress.title: WordPress
wordpress.description: For clients who need a simple and powerful content management system (CMS), I offer WordPress website creation. It's a flexible solution, ideal for blogs and showcase sites.

figma.title: Figma (UI/UX)
figma.description: Before coding, I design mockups and interactive prototypes with Figma. This UI/UX design step is crucial for visualizing the project, testing user journeys and ensuring an intuitive final result.

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.description: For e-commerce projects, I work with Shopify. It's the reference platform for creating a high-performance online store, managing sales, payments and logistics with ease.

0.description: Platform for finding food trucks and caterers in Switzerland. Easily find mobile catering services for all types of events.

1.description: A CRM for a startup that allows you to manage leads and sales opportunities.

2.description: Intelligent assistant connected to WhatsApp to automate the management of multiple Airbnb apartments. The bot analyzes messages, understands questions and responds automatically in French based on Airbnb iCal calendars.

3.description: Citizen dashboard aggregating environmental data (Air, Weather, Water) via API integration and official data scraping.

contactform.title: Get in touch?
contactform.subtitle: I will do my best to reply as soon as possible.
contactform.success_text: Thank you for your message. I will get back to you as soon as possible.
contactform.honeypot: Do not fill this field if you are human:

cookies.title: We respect your privacy
cookies.description: This site uses cookies to analyze traffic and improve your experience. You can accept or decline these cookies.

blog.title: blog & tips
blog.subtitle: Discover my tips for developing your online presence in Guadeloupe. Practical articles to improve your visibility and attract more clients.
blog.need_help_title: Need help with your web project?
blog.need_help_text: These articles gave you ideas? Let's talk about your project and how I can help you make it happen.
